compressed_prompt: write song lyrics on socio-economic issue; english, all lowercase; no commas
response:
in the streets of inequality we roam
searching for a place to call our own
the cost of living is rising high
while wages stagnate and hopes say goodbye

in the shadows of the wealthy few
many struggle to make ends meet anew
the divide is growing wide and deep
as the system fails to lift them up from sleep

we're trapped in a cycle of debt and pain
trying to survive but it's all in vain
the american dream is lost on the floor
as the privileged few walk out the door

in this land of opportunity and strife
we're fighting for a chance to live a life
free from the chains of economic might
where every voice is heard and every soul takes flight

we need a change we need a new way
to bridge the gap and seize the day
for a brighter tomorrow we must stand
and fight for justice hand in hand
